entities.name: MELOIDOGYNE JAVANICA
entities.description: A species of root-knot nematode that is parasitized by fungi

entities.name: PHOMA GLOMERATA
entities.description: A fungus that is antagonistic to and infects Meloidogyne javanica

entities.name: CURVULARIA SPP
entities.description: Fungal species that infect Meloidogyne javanica

entities.name: CURVULARIA PALLESCENS
entities.description: A specific species of fungus that infects Meloidogyne javanica

entities.name: LABORATORY TESTS
entities.description: Experimental tests used to observe the infection of nematodes by fungi

entities.name: PARASITISM
entities.description: The biological relationship where one organism lives on or in another
